You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. Important Package and Feature Information  Protection Package Premier ($470 value)License Plate FrameRubber Floor MatsCargo TrayWheel Locks  Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift.  With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane.  Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.Technology and Telematics Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. description: Why BUY from Sheridan Ford?     When you choose this Star White Metallic Tri-Coat 2020 Ford Explorer XLT with 81,005 miles, you are not just buying a used vehicle - you are investing in quality, reliability and peace of mind. Our clientele depend on us for Transparent Pricing, Convenience and, most importantly, Customer FIRST Service!     No Accidents!      One Owner!  What this vehicle includes:     Ford Co-Pilot360 Assist+ ($795 value)COMFORT PACKAGE ($715 value)1st and 2nd Row Heated SeatsHeated Steering WheelEquipment Group 202A ($5,140 value)          Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera with washer - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. Even if there are sloppy conditions, the washer keeps the camera's view clean. Rear camera with washer is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safeTechnology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system.  Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road. Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot. description: Red-Hot 2021 Chevy Silverado 1500 RST 4x4 | Drive your Dreams in Truck Country  If you've been hunting around Tom Tepe Autocenter in Milan, Indiana, and Car Country in Aurora, IN, and Harrison, OH, for a truck that's as ready for work as it is for play across Southeast Indiana, Greater Cincinnati, and Northern Kentucky, this 2021 Chevrolet Silverado 1500 RST 4WD is the one that turns heads. Dressed in Red Hot with bold 20" painted aluminum wheels, it looks every bit as strong as it drives.  Under the hood, the 3.0L I6 paired with a 10-speed automatic delivers confident power and smooth shifting, whether you're towing equipment, hauling weekend toys, or commuting into the Cincinnati metro area. The Z71 Off-Road Package, off-road suspension, hill descent control, and front recovery hooks give you extra muscle for muddy job sites, campgrounds, and backroads adventures.  Inside the roomy Crew Cab, comfort and technology come together to make every mile easier. The 10-way power driver seat with lumbar and leather-appointed front seats helps you stay relaxed on long drives, while dual-zone automatic climate control keeps everyone happy from Milan to Northern Kentucky. With Bluetooth, wireless phone projection, Apple CarPlay/Android Auto, and the Chevrolet Infotainment 3 Plus system, your music, maps, and messages are right where you need themhands on the wheel, eyes on the road.  This Silverado is built to work. The Trailering Package, integrated trailer brake controller, hitch guidance, spray-on Chevytec bedliner, bed protection package, and 120-volt bed-mounted power outlet make towing and loading far more convenient. Add the EZ Lift power lock & release tailgate, rear wheelhouse liners, and rear 60/40 folding bench seat with storage, and you've got serious everyday practicality for life in and around Aurora, Harrison, and beyond.  When the day's work is done, you'll appreciate the upscale touches: Bose 7-speaker premium sound, heated front seats, heated steering wheel, power sunroof, deep-tinted glass, LED cargo lighting, front LED fog lamps, and keyless open & start. Safety features such as an HD rear vision camera, electronic stability control, traction control, multiple airbags, and a theft deterrent system help protect what matters most.  Ready to see why truck shoppers from Milan, Aurora, Harrison, Greater Cincinnati, and Northern Kentucky call us their pre-owned superstore? Visit  https://www.TomTepe.com/  to explore this Silverado 1500 RST, check availability, value your trade, and discover more great trucks that help you Drive your Dreams every day. description: Discover the perfect balance of style, capability, and technology in the 2020 Subaru Forester Sport. This exceptional SUV is the ultimate companion for your adventures, seamlessly blending impressive performance with a refined and versatile design.  Elevate your driving experience with a host of premium features, including:  - Auto-Dimming Mirror with Compass - Splash Guards - Door Scuff Protector - All-Weather Floor Liners - Rear Bumper Cover - Rear Seatback Protector - Cargo Net  The Forester Sport's 2.5L 4-cylinder DOHC 16V VVT engine, paired with Lineartronic CVT and Subaru's renowned Symmetrical All-Wheel Drive, delivers exceptional efficiency, with an EPA-estimated 26 city/33 highway MPG. This powertrain provides the perfect balance of responsive acceleration and confident handling, ensuring you'll enjoy every mile behind the wheel.  Slip into the comfortable and supportive sport cloth-upholstered seats, which are both heated for your year-round comfort. The panoramic moonroof floods the cabin with natural light, while the STARLINK 6.5-inch Multimedia Plus System with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto integration keeps you connected and entertained.  Safety is paramount in the Forester Sport, with features like Eyesight Driver Assist Technology, Blind-Spot Detection, Rear Cross-Traffic Alert, and a Rear-Vision Camera providing peace of mind on every journey. The advanced airbag system and high-strength steel construction further enhance your protection. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. Adaptive Cruise Control  Backup Camera  Lane Departure Warning  This 2025 Toyota Corolla SE is a standout choice for drivers seeking an exceptional blend of style, efficiency, and advanced technology. With its sleek exterior in a timeless White hue and a well-appointed interior, this Corolla SE is poised to exceed your expectations.  Under the hood, the 2.0L I4 DOHC 16V engine paired with a smooth-shifting CVT transmission delivers an exceptional driving experience. Boasting an impressive 31 MPG in the city and 40 MPG on the highway, this Corolla SE offers exceptional fuel efficiency, helping you save at the pump.  The cabin of this Corolla SE is filled with a wealth of premium features that elevate the driving experience. Enjoy the convenience of Bluetooth, AUX, and USB connectivity, as well as the clarity of the 8" Toyota Audio Multimedia system. Stay comfortable year-round with the automatic temperature control, and keep your hands on the wheel with the steering wheel-mounted audio controls.  Safety is a top priority in this Corolla SE, with a comprehensive suite of advanced driver-assistance technologies. Benefit from the peace of mind provided by features like Adaptive Cruise Control, Backup Camera, and Lane Departure Warning, all working together to help keep you and your loved ones protected on the road.  Whether you're commuting to work, running errands, or embarking on a weekend getaway, this 2025 Toyota Corolla SE is the perfect companion. With its exceptional efficiency, advanced technology, and impressive safety features, this Corolla SE is a compelling choice that is sure to exceed your expectations. description: Introducing the 2020 Ford Explorer XLT  the perfect blend of power, style, and cutting-edge technology, designed to elevate your driving experience to new heights! With a modest mileage of just 58,936 miles, this versatile SUV is ready to take you on countless adventures, promising reliability and performance every mile of the way.  Dressed to impress in a classic white exterior, this Explorer stands out with its sleek and modern design. The body-color front bumper and active grille shutters not only enhance its aerodynamic profile but also contribute to its fuel efficiency, making every drive as economical as it is stylish. Step inside, and you'll be greeted by a spacious and sophisticated black cloth interior, offering both comfort and durability for you and your passengers.  Under the hood, the 2020 Ford Explorer XLT is powered by a robust EcoBoost 2.3L Turbo I4 engine, delivering an exhilarating 300 horsepower and 310 lb-ft of torque. This powerhouse is paired with a smooth 10-Speed Shiftable Automatic transmission, providing you with seamless gear transitions and a responsive driving experience that adapts to your needs, whether you're cruising down the highway or navigating city streets.  Technology enthusiasts will be thrilled with the Explorer's impressive suite of features. Stay connected on the go with the wireless data link and Wi-Fi hotspot, ensuring you and your passengers are always in touch with the world around you. The FordPass Connect app compatibility brings convenience to your fingertips, allowing you to start your engine remotely and access vital vehicle information with ease.  The infotainment system, featuring an 8-inch touchscreen, is powered by Ford's SYNC technology, providing an intuitive interface for all your media needs. Enjoy seamless smartphone integration with Android Auto, and make hands-free phone calls or send electronic messages using voice-operated controls, keeping your focus on the road ahead. With Amazon Alexa integration, you can access your favorite playlists, get directions, or even control smart home devices from the comfort of your driver's seat.  Entertainment is taken to the next level with the Explorer's six-speaker audio system, enhanced by speed-sensitive volume control to ensure optimal sound quality at any speed. And with SiriusXM satellite radio, you have access to a world of music, news, and sports channels, ensuring there's something for everyone on every journey.  Safety and peace of mind are paramount, and the 2020 Ford Explorer XLT delivers with a range of features designed to protect you and your loved ones. From its sturdy build to advanced technology, this vehicle is engineered to provide confidence and security, mile after mile.  In summary, the 2020 Ford Explorer XLT is not just a vehicle; it's an experience. With its perfect combination of power, technology, and style, it's the ideal choice for those who demand more from their SUV. Whether you're embarking on a family road trip or simply tackling your daily commute, this Explorer is ready to exceed your expectations. Don't miss your chance to own this remarkable SUV  contact us today to schedule a test drive and experience the thrill for yourself!

description: Meet the sensible-but-sassy commuter that refuses to be boring: a 2020 Honda Civic Sport in a clean, classic White exterior with a sharp Black interior. Its the car that will happily shuttle groceries, attend weekend adventures, and silently judge other compact cars that wear spoilers like costume jewelry  but in the nicest way possible.  Performance & Personality Under the hood sits Hondas trusty 2.0L inline-4, producing 158 horsepower and 138 lb-ft of torque. Its the sort of engine that doesnt overpromise and then ask for a midlife crisis; it simply delivers a spirited shove when city traffic parts and a calm, economical stride on the highway. Expect a crisp throttle response that makes merging less of a negotiation and more of a confident sashay. This Civic is engineered for everyday fun: nimble handling, communicative steering, and a suspension tuned to keep things sporty without making potholes feel like personal affronts.  Fuel Economy Economy is one of this Civics many charming party tricks: 29 MPG in the city and 37 MPG on the highway. Translation: fewer stops for gas, more stops for questions like Do you want snacks? and Is that a playlist from the exact right era? Long highway runs will feel efficient, and daily errands will feel pleasantly inexpensive.  Exterior Details Finished in a crisp White that looks impeccably classy at stoplights and perfectly smug in parking lots, the exterior styling is modern and purposeful. Sported features typically include athletic wheel designs, subtle aerodynamic sculpting, and tasteful accents that hint at performance without shouting. The rear spoiler and sporty center-exit exhaust treatment give the back end some attitude  the sort of attitude that wont get a ticket for being loud, but will get a compliment at a coffee shop.  Interior Comfort & Practicality The Black interior is the automotive equivalent of a little black dress  endlessly flattering and hits the right note for almost any occasion. Sport trim usually brings cloth sport seats with contrast stitching and supportive bolstering that keep drivers snug in corners without being pretzel-inducing on long drives. The cabin is ergonomically sensible: controls fall to hand, visibility is good, and the layout is refreshingly annoyance-free.  Practical touches include a fold-down 60/40 rear seat for those moments when an IKEA excursion becomes an unplanned lifestyle choice, generous door pockets, cupholders that actually hold cups, and a center console with enough storage for sunglasses, receipts, and that one coin from 2011 that somehow looks sentimental. Climate control is user-friendly and keeps things comfortable whether its a blustery morning or a hot run to the farmers market.  Technology & Infotainment Factory-equipped infotainment gives drivers modern connectivity without turning the morning commute into an episode of I Cant Figure Out My Car. Expect a responsive touchscreen interface with Bluetooth hands-free calling and audio streaming, plus USB ports for phone charging and its wealthy cousin, data transfer. Apple CarPlay and Android Auto compatibility simplify navigation, music, and messaging so the phones best features can be used safely while driving. The audio system is aimed at clarity and usability  not a stadium-subwoofer rave, but perfectly competent for playlists, podcasts, and audiobooks.  Safety & Driver Aids Safety gear reads like a checklist of grown-up decisions: multiple airbags, anti-lock brakes (ABS), electronic stability control, traction control, and a rearview camera that now comes standard on every modern car because backing up should not require a Ouija board. Tire pressure monitoring helps keep things safe and efficient, and Hondas engineering is built around reliability and crashworthiness. Some Sport models feature advanced driver-assist technologies (adaptive cruise, lane-keeping aids, collision mitigation) depending on the factory options  useful for highway tranquility[!@@Additional Technology is at the forefront, with an 8-inch touchscreen display that provides seamless access to infotainment options. The Sport's cabin is not just about looks; it also offers ample space for both passengers and cargo, making it a practical choice for families and commuters alike.Under the hood, the Accord is powered by a robust 1.5-liter 4-cylinder turbocharged engine, which pairs seamlessly with the CVT transmission for an exhilarating yet efficient drive. The engine delivers a respectable 192 horsepower, providing plenty of power for spirited driving while maintaining excellent fuel efficiency. This performance package ensures responsive handling and a smooth, quiet ride, making it perfect for both urban commutes and long highway journeys. description: Discover the perfect blend of power, capability, and refined style in this 2020 GMC Sierra 1500 SLT. With its impressive EcoTec3 5.3L V8 engine, 10-speed automatic transmission, and 4-wheel drive, this Sierra delivers exceptional performance and versatility. Boasting a sleek White exterior, this truck is not only visually stunning but also built to handle any task with ease.  - CLEAN CARFAX - SLT PREMIUM PACKAGE - SUNROOF, POWER - BED LINER, SPRAY-ON - ALL-WEATHER FLOOR LINER, 1ST AND 2ND ROWS - WHEEL LOCKS, SET OF 4  Designed with the discerning driver in mind, the Sierra SLT comes equipped with a wealth of premium features that elevate the driving experience. Enjoy the convenience of the SLT Convenience Package, which includes the 20" Polished aluminum wheels, chrome assist steps, and more. The power sunroof allows you to take in the great outdoors, while the spray-on bed liner and all-weather floor liners ensure your Sierra stays looking its best, no matter the task at hand.  Inside, the Sierra SLT offers a refined and comfortable cabin, with features like heated and ventilated front seats, a heated steering wheel, and a premium audio system with SiriusXM and Apple CarPlay/Android Auto compatibility. The 10-way power-adjustable driver and passenger seats, along with the driver's memory function, ensure you and your passengers can find the perfect position for maximum comfort.  Safety and technology are also top priorities in this Sierra SLT. With features like the ProGrade Trailering System, Hitch Guidance with Hitch View, and the In-Vehicle Trailering App, you'll have the confidence and control to tackle any towing or hauling task with ease. The 4G LTE Wi-Fi hotspot and OnStar & GMC Connected Services further enhance your connectivity and peace of mind on the road.  Whether you're looking for a capable work truck, a versatile family hauler, or a stylish and well-appointed daily driver, this 2020 GMC Sierra 1500 SLT is the perfect choice. Experience the ultimate in power, technology, and refinement by scheduling a test drive today. We're confident you'll be impressed by everything this remarkable truck has to offer.[!@@Additional Info@@!]Preferred Equipment Group 4SA,SLT Convenience Package,SLT Premium Package,Trailering Feel the confidence increase as you navigate through challenging landscapes, thanks to impressive traction control and brake assist systems. This SUV is a true powerhouse, designed for those who demand performance in every aspect of their driving experience, whether it's cruising on the highway or venturing off the beaten path.. description: Welcome to Cocoa Ford, Florida's fastest-growing dealership!!  Home of Superior Customer Service and a true LIFETIME POWERTRAIN WARRANTY*!!   See a Dealership Representative for full and complete details   ALL Cocoa Ford Pre-Driven Vehicles get a Fresh OIL CHANGE, a New AIR FILTER, a New CABIN FILTER, New WIPER BLADES and an ALIGNMENT!!  This Billet Silver Metallic Clearcoat 2020 Ram 1500 Rebel would be a welcomed addition to your family/business. No Accidents!  One Owner! Trying to drive with bulky winter gloves on isn't always easy. Keep your hands warm in cold temperatures so you can ditch the mitts and get a firm grip with this heated steering wheel. Heated driver and front passenger seat cushions - That's hot. Heated driver and front passenger seat cushions provide more targeted warmth so you can get comfortable quicker in cold weather. If you have lower body pain, you might also be soothed by the heat while you drive. No matter the weather, find comfort in heated driver and front passenger seat cushions. This upholstery offers an attractive combination of appearance and textures.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system.  Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road. Wireless connectivity - Strike the cord. Wireless technology makes it easy to place calls without having to fumble with your phone. It integrates your device with the system inside your vehicle for hands-free access. Keep connected and keep your hands on the wheel with wireless connectivity. Cocoa Ford is not responsible for typographical errors. Pictures are for illustrative purposes only. description: Introducing the all-new 2020 Hyundai PALISADE SEL, the ultimate SUV for those who demand luxury, performance, and style. Step into the spacious and sophisticated interior, designed with extra room for your comfort and convenience. With its sleek and modern exterior, this SUV will turn heads wherever you go.Under the hood, the PALISADE SEL packs a powerful punch with its 3.8-liter V6 engine, delivering an impressive 291 horsepower. Paired with an 8-speed automatic transmission, this SUV offers a smooth and responsive ride, perfect for city driving or off-road adventures.But it's not just about performance, the PALISADE SEL is also loaded with the latest technology and safety features. From the 10.25-inch touchscreen display with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto compatibility, to the advanced safety suite including blind spot collision avoidance and rear cross-traffic alert, you can drive with peace of mind knowing that you and your passengers are always protected.And with its spacious third-row seating, the PALISADE SEL can comfortably accommodate up to 7 passengers, making it the perfect choice for family trips or weekend getaways. Plus, with its impressive fuel efficiency of 19 mpg in the city and 26 mpg on the highway, you can travel further without having to constantly refuel.Don't miss your chance to experience the luxury and performance of the 2020 Hyundai PALISADE SEL. Visit our dealership today and take this stunning SUV for a test drive. With its extra spacing and top-of-the-line features, you won't want to drive anything else. description: Experience full-size capability and comfort with this 2020 Ford Expedition XLT 4x4 in striking Dark Gray. Ready for family adventures or road trips, it features a robust EcoBoost 3.5L Twin Turbo V6 engine, 10-speed shiftable automatic transmission, and advanced 4X4 with part-time on-demand settings. Stay connected with an 8-inch SYNC infotainment touchscreen, Apple CarPlay and Android Auto, and FordPass Connect with Wi-Fi hotspot. Enjoy premium touches like 15 cupholders, power-adjustable driver's seat with lumbar support, and tri-zone automatic climate control with independently controlled rear air conditioning. Safety comes first with front automatic emergency braking, lane keeping assist, blind spot monitoring, rear cross traffic alert, and a rearview camera with washer. Convenience abounds with push-button start, keyless entry, power-folding third-row seats, running boards, trailer tow package, and class IV hitch. description: Elevate your driving experience with this stunning 2020 Honda Accord Hybrid EX-L. This exceptional vehicle combines sophisticated style, advanced technology, and remarkable fuel efficiency, making it the perfect choice for the discerning driver.  Boasting an impressive array of premium features, this Accord Hybrid stands out from the crowd. Key highlights include:  - 10 Speakers - 450-Watt AM/FM/HD Premium Audio System - Dual-Zone Automatic Climate Control - Power Moonroof - Blind Spot Information (BSI) System - Collision Mitigation Braking System (CMBS) + FCW - Adaptive Cruise Control with Low-Speed Follow - Leather-Trimmed Seating - Heated Front Seats - Power Driver's Seat with Memory - 17-Inch Machine-Finished Alloy Wheels  Powered by a 2.0L 4-Cylinder DOHC 16V i-VTEC engine paired with an eCVT transmission, this Accord Hybrid delivers an exceptional driving experience. With an EPA-estimated 48 mpg in the city and 47 mpg on the highway, you'll enjoy unparalleled fuel efficiency without sacrificing performance.  The sleek and sophisticated exterior, finished in a stunning White color, is complemented by a spacious and well-appointed interior. Premium amenities, such as the leather-wrapped steering wheel and the advanced infotainment system with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto, ensure a seamless and enjoyable driving experience.  Safety is a top priority, and this Accord Hybrid is equipped with a comprehensive suite of advanced driver-assistance technologies. From the Blind Spot Information System to the Collision Mitigation Braking System, you can drive with confidence, knowing that you and your passengers are well-protected.  Whether you're commuting, embarking on a road trip, or simply enjoying the pleasure of the open road, this 2020 Honda Accord Hybrid EX-L is the perfect companion. Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system.  Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road. Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. description: Discover the perfect blend of style, performance, and versatility in the 2020 Nissan Altima 2.5 SV. This exceptional sedan boasts a sleek, modern design and a host of advanced features that cater to your every need. With its impressive fuel efficiency, all-wheel drive capability, and an array of cutting-edge technologies, the Altima 2.5 SV is the ideal companion for your daily commute or weekend adventures.  Highlighted by its striking Silver exterior, this Altima 2.5 SV is a true head-turner. Step inside and you'll be greeted by a well-appointed interior, featuring comfortable Cloth Seat Trim, a Sunroof, and Heated Front Bucket Seats to keep you cozy in any weather. The NissanConnect system with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto seamlessly integrates your smartphone, allowing you to stay connected and entertained on the go.  - Accident-Free CARFAX - Recent Trade-In - Apple CarPlay - Android Auto - USB Port - Heated Seats - Sunroof  The Altima's 2.5L 4-Cylinder DOHC 16V engine, paired with a responsive CVT with Xtronic transmission and All-Wheel Drive, delivers an exceptional driving experience. With an EPA-estimated 26 MPG in the city and 36 MPG on the highway, this Nissan Altima offers impressive fuel efficiency, helping you go further between fill-ups.  Designed with your safety in mind, the Altima 2.5 SV is equipped with a comprehensive suite of advanced safety features, including Blind Spot Warning, Rear Parking Sensors, and Automatic High-Beam Headlights. These cutting-edge technologies work together to provide you and your loved ones with the utmost protection on the road.  Whether you're commuting to work, embarking on a road trip, or simply running errands, the 2020 Nissan Altima 2.5 SV is the perfect companion. description: Elevate your daily drive with this breathtaking Arctic Gray Metallic 2020 BMW X7 xDrive40i. This All-Wheel Drive masterpiece is powered by a refined 3.0L I6 engine, offering a seamless blend of power and grace. Designed for those who refuse to compromise, this SUV provides a commanding presence on the road while surrounding you in a world of pure automotive excellence. From its M Sport Package styling to its 21" Double-Spoke wheels, every detail is crafted to impress.  Unparalleled Comfort and Executive Style Step inside to experience the Executive Package, featuring a Panoramic Sky Lounge LED Roof that transforms the cabin into a private oasis. The interior is draped in Vernasca Leather with Contrast Stitching and accented with Genuine Wood inserts. Whether you are the driver or a passenger, you'll enjoy the ultimate in relaxation with Front Massaging and Ventilated Seats, Heated and Cooled Cup Holders, and even Rear Electric Side Window Shades for added privacy and comfort.  State-of-the-Art Technology at Your Fingertips The 2020 X7 is packed with futuristic tech designed to make every journey effortless. The Head-Up Display projects vital information onto the windshield, while BMW Gesture Control allows you to manage the infotainment system with simple hand movements. Audiophiles will love the harman/kardon Surround Sound System, providing crystal-clear audio throughout the cabin. Plus, with Apple CarPlay and a built-in Navigation System, you are always connected to the world around you.  Confidence with Pro-Level Safety Safety is paramount in this BMW, which comes equipped with the Driving Assistance Professional Package. Features like Active Driving Assistant Pro and the Extended Traffic Jam Assistant help take the stress out of heavy traffic. Parking is a breeze thanks to the Surround View with 3D View and Parking Assistant Plus, which give you a virtual eyes-on-the-back-of-your-head perspective. With Auto-leveling suspension and Rain Sensing Wipers, the X7 adapts to any road condition instantly.  Versatility for the Whole Family This SUV is as practical as it is luxurious, featuring Second-Row Captains Chairs and a Reclining 3rd Row to accommodate everyone comfortably. The Cold Weather Package ensures that everyone stays warm with Front and Rear Heated Seats, a Heated Steering Wheel, and 5-Zone Automatic Climate Control. With Soft-Close Automatic Doors and a Remote Engine Start system, the X7 provides a level of convenience that makes every departure feel like a special occasion.  Faster. Simpler. More Transparent. Superior Automotive Group has helped thousands of customers find the right car by leveraging one of Arkansas' largest selections of new and pre-owned vehicles at unparalleled prices. Yet, it's our extra-mile customer service and uncommonly candid and respectful staff that have won the trust and loyalty of Arkansas drivers for 30 years. Whether you need to pull up your favorite playlist or navigate through traffic, everything is right at your fingertips on the clear display. The interior also features a Power Moonroof to let in the natural light and an auto-dimming rearview mirror to keep those nighttime drives comfortable. Plus, with the HomeLink garage door transmitter, coming home is just as seamless as heading out.  Sophisticated Comfort for Everyone Inside, you'll find premium SofTex seat trim and Heated Front Bucket Seats that make every commute feel like a getaway. The Highlander is designed with the whole family in mind, offering Rear Air Conditioning and a reclining 3rd-row split-bench seat so everyone stays cozy. Dual-zone automatic temperature control means no more arguments over the thermostat the driver and passenger can each set their own perfect climate.  Safety and Convenience Combined Safety is built into every corner of this SUV. From Auto High-beam Headlights and front fog lights to the Exterior Parking Camera, you'll have a clear view of your surroundings regardless of the conditions. Each vehicle undergoes a comprehensive inspection including: powertrain, exterior, interior, electronics, safety systems, undercarriage and a road test. Lexus trained technicians inspect every aspect of the pre-owned vehicle. Ask your Salesperson for a copy of the inspection and see what was noted and repaired on your next vehicle!  Recent Arrival! 20/26 City/Highway MPG  The 2020 Hyundai Santa Fe Limited is the perfect SUV for someone who wants comfort, performance, premium features, and outstanding value all in one sharp looking package. From the moment you walk up to it, the Santa Fe Limited gives off an upscale presence with its sleek lines, bold front fascia, and refined styling cues, everything about it looks modern, confident, and ready for the road.  Under the hood, the Limited trim offers the powerful 2.0liter turbocharged four cylinder engine, delivering 235 horsepower and 260 lb ft of torque for smooth, confident acceleration whether you're merging, passing, or cruising.  Paired with an efficient 8speed automatic transmission, it feels composed and responsive, and with available all wheel drive, it offers reassuring traction in all weather conditions.  Fuel efficiency is strong for a midsize SUV of this capability, offering around 20 mpg city and 26/27 mpg highway, depending on drivetrain.  Inside, the Santa Fe Limited really shines. Hyundai designed this cabin to feel premium, spacious, and incredibly user friendly. Reviewers consistently praise its upscale materials, roomy seating, and intuitive infotainment system, making daily driving more relaxing and long trips more enjoyable.  With comfortable seating for five and a generous 35.9 cubic feet of cargo space behind the second row, or over 70 cubic feet with the seats folded, its ready for family life, road trips, and everything in between.  Safety and technology are major highlights of the Limited trim. You get standard features like Apple CarPlay, Android Auto, a blind spot camera system, automatic emergency braking, adaptive cruise control, and more, all designed to keep you confident and connected.  Hyundai is known for overdelivering on value, and this model continues that tradition.  Ride quality is another strong point. The Santa Fe Limited delivers a smooth, quiet, and composed driving experience, with excellent visibility and comfortable seating that makes every drive, from school drop off's to weekend adventures, feel effortless.   If you're looking for a midsize SUV that blends luxury level comfort, strong turbo performance, standout safety tech, and Hyundai's legendary value, the 2020 Hyundai Santa Fe Limited is a smart, stylish, and satisfying choice. Its the kind of SUV that truly elevates your daily driving experience without ever pushing your budget out of reach. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. description: The 2020 Ford Ranger XLT is an impressive pickup truck that combines rugged capability with modern technology and comfort. Available with several premium packages, including *Equipment Group 301A Mid*, *Black Appearance Package*, *Trailer Tow Package*, and *Sport Appearance Package*, the Ranger XLT is designed to cater to a range of needs and preferences.Under the hood, the Ranger XLT boasts a powerful EcoBoost 2.3L I-4 gasoline engine that churns out an impressive 270 horsepower, paired with a smooth 10-speed automatic transmission. This combination not only delivers robust performance but also enhances fuel efficiency, making it a great choice for both city driving and off-road adventures.Safety features in the Ranger XLT are top-notch, with smart innovations such as forward collision mitigation, lane departure prevention, and rear collision warning. These systems work together to provide a safer driving experience, ensuring that both driver and passengers are well-protected on the road. The inclusion of brake assist further enhances safety by providing extra stopping power during emergencies.Convenience is taken to the next level with features like smart device mirroring, allowing you to seamlessly connect your smartphone to the vehicles infotainment system. The touchscreen interface makes it easy to access navigation, music, and other applications without taking your eyes off the road. Additionally, the mobile hotspot feature ensures that you stay connected, no matter where your journey takes you.The Ranger XLT also sports practical features such as a rear camera for improved visibility and cruise control to minimize driver fatigue during long trips. With a towing capacity of up to 7,500 lbs. when equipped with the Trailer Tow Package, this truck is more than capable of handling your hauling needs.Whether youre looking for a dependable workhorse or a stylish vehicle for daily commuting, the 2020 Ford Ranger XLT stands out. With its robust engine, advanced safety features, and modern technology, its engineered to offer a balanced blend of performance and comfort. Explore the various packages available to customize your Ranger XLT to perfectly fit your lifestyle and driving needs. Dont miss out on the opportunity to experience this remarkable truck!Choose *Covina* *Kia* for your next vehicle purchase and experience exceptional service, a diverse selection of Kia models, and unbeatable deals tailored for our local *Covina*, *West Covina*, *Citrus*, and *Walnut* communities. description: The 2020 BMW 745e xDrive iPerformance is a luxurious vehicle equipped with sophisticated technology and impressive features. This model boasts two remarkable packages, the Premium Package and the Executive Package, both designed to enhance your driving experience with premium comforts and advanced safety technologies.  Under the hood, the BMW 745e is powered by a robust 3L I-6 gasoline direct injection engine, delivering 280 horsepower and paired with an 8-speed automatic transmission. This powerful combination not only offers exhilarating acceleration but also smooth handling, making it a joy to drive on any road.  Safety is paramount in the BMW 745e, featuring advanced systems like forward collision mitigation and front pedestrian impact prevention. The forward collision mitigation system actively monitors the road ahead and prepares the vehicle for an impending collision, helping to minimize the severity of an accident. Similarly, the front pedestrian impact prevention system works diligently to identify pedestrians on the road, ensuring a safer driving environment.  Convenience features such as a mobile hotspot allow you to stay connected on the go, providing internet access for your devices without using up your data. The rear camera enhances visibility, making parking and reversing safer and easier by displaying a clear image of whats behind you.  One of the standout features of the Premium Package is the head-up display, which presents vital driving information directly in your line of sight. This means you can keep your eyes on the road while still being informed about your speed and other important metrics. Additionally, the package includes power rear side window sunblinds and a power rear windshield blind for added comfort and privacy.  The Executive Package takes luxury to the next level with a Nappa leather upholstered dashboard and sunroof options that provide an airy feel to the cabin. The dual sunroof allows for an open, spacious atmosphere, perfect for enjoying those sunny drives.  Other key features include brake assist for emergency stopping, cruise control for effortless highway driving, and ventilated front seats to keep you cool during hot weather. The BMW 745e xDrive iPerformance is not just a vehicle; its a sanctuary on wheels that combines performance, luxury, and state-of-the-art technology, making it a top choice for discerning drivers. This 1-owner 2020 Lexus RC 350 F Sport is a striking example of precision engineering and low-mileage exclusivity! The Infrared exterior paint amplifies the coupes sculpted bodywork, accentuating its aggressive stance, sharp character lines, and aerodynamic silhouette. The signature spindle grille, F Sport mesh pattern, and LED headlamps give the front fascia a commanding presence, while 19-inch F Sport alloy wheels and unique badging reinforce its performance-focused identity.  Powered by a naturally aspirated 3.5-liter V6 engine producing 311 horsepower, this RC 350 F Sport channels power through a quick-shifting automatic transmission for immediate throttle response and smooth acceleration. Paddle shifters mounted to the steering wheel place gear control at your fingertips, enhancing driver engagement. The F Sport-tuned suspension and adaptive variable suspension system sharpen handling dynamics, keeping the coupe composed through corners while maintaining comfort during everyday driving. The selectable drive modes allow you to tailor steering feel, throttle sensitivity, and suspension characteristics to suit your preference.  Inside, the cabin is finished in an eye-catching White and Black leather combination that highlights the RCs driver-centric layout. Deeply bolstered F Sport front seats provide excellent lateral support, complemented by aluminum sport pedals and distinctive trim details unique to the F Sport package. The leather-wrapped steering wheel and shift knob feel substantial in hand, reinforcing the performance character of the vehicle. Every surface reflects careful craftsmanship, from the stitched dashboard to the precisely fitted interior panels.  Technology integrates seamlessly into the cockpit with a high-resolution central display, navigation capability, smartphone integration, and a premium audio system engineered for crisp, immersive sound. Dual-zone automatic climate control maintains personalized comfort, while keyless access and push-button start simplify daily use.
